# AfterClick

AfterClick offers a paid ecommerce diagnostic called the AfterClick Revenue Map.

Public offer:
- Website: https://after-click.com/
- Sample Map: https://after-click.com/sample-map/
- Product: AfterClick Revenue Map
- Founder price: 299 USD
- Delivery: private HTML report link, shareable PDF export and AI-ready Markdown file

Boundaries:
- No revenue, ROAS, conversion rate or profit guarantee.
- No private store/admin access required for the standard Revenue Map.
- The report is a diagnostic and prioritization map, not a full redesign, heatmap study or user testing package.

Contact:
- support@after-click.com
